site: https://creatives-takeover.com
name: Creatives Takeover
description: AI-powered startup builder for first-time founders. Tools for startup idea validation, MVP planning, customer discovery, fundraising preparation, and go-to-market execution.

purpose: Help early-stage founders, indie hackers, and solo builders go from idea to launch with AI-guided workflows, a startup mentor marketplace, and a founder community.
